reviews.review_title: Learn to fly & climb the sky!
reviews.review_description:
If you love platform games and VR then Sky Climb smashes those things together in a colourful explosion of energetic fun!
Now available as free to play multiplayer where you can work towards unlocking additional content or you can get instant access to the fantastic single player game mode via DLC, there's definitely something for everyone here!
VR Monkey has added so much content to the game since launch and are always committed to listening to community feedback and creating updates.

It gets the Pickle seal of approval!
😁✌️☮️❤️

This game is really fun. I actually got to play with the owner, and he showed me how everything works, and if you like parkour/racing, you need to try this. There's so many cool features, and you should definitely give it a try 😁

reviews.review_title: Nice Title Party for friends and family!
reviews.review_description:
(English)

A casual "skill" game, with a tender aesthetic but that will challenge any player of any age. Not only to improve times or get stars to pass screens; but to take the victories in its also fantastic multiplayer mode.
Valid for all audiences. Not dizzy. It is also not easy at first for any player, as you will see how touching buttons does not give you an advantage over others with less time. Holding on and pushing forward is your key; and he does it "PHENOMENAL".
You will have fun moments, harder challenging moments and easier ones. You will determine your result with your skill.
Very original design, which encourages you to improve yourself in each attempt.
A "party" game with family and friends if you play its highly recommended multiplayer mode, and with a very challenging story mode with very different environments. Recommendable.
In story mode I would give 4 stars for its difficulty (although maintaining the challenge is appreciated), but without a doubt its multiplayer is 5 stars for casual play / with friends / with family. Your outfit for your proposal and enjoyment is worth your 5.
Congratulations. A fresh and different proposal that deserves to be considered.

****
(Español)

Un juego de "habilidad" desenfadado, con estetica tierna pero que a todo jugador de cualquer edad le va a retar. No solo por mejorar tiempos o conseguir estrellas para pasar pantallas; sino para hacerse con las vicgorias en su tambien fantastico modo multijugador.
Valido para todos los publicos. No marea. Tampoco es facil de primeras para ningun jugador, pues vera como tocar botones no otorga ventaja frente o otros con menor tiempo. Agarrarse e impulsarse es su clave; y lo hace "FENOMENAL".
Pasaras momentos divertidos , momentos retantes mas duros y otros mas faciles. Tu te marcaras con tu habilidad tu resultado. 
Diseño muy original, que te anima a superarte en cada intento. 
Un juego "party" con familia y amigos si juegas su modo multijugador altamente recomendado, y con modo historia muy retante con entornos muy diferentes. Recomendable.
En modo historia pondria 4 estrellas por su dificultad(aunque se agradece mantener el reto) , pero sin duda su multijugador son 5 estrellas para jugar ocasional /con amigos/con familia. Su conjunto para su propuesta y disfrute valen su 5.
Enhorabuena. Una propuesta fresca y distinta que merece ser considerada.

All the arm flapping and franticness of it is a hit when we play with our kids. Easy to pick up yet difficult to master with enough to keep you coming back for more. Prepare to feel like you swam 20 laps in the pool

reviews.review_description: I’ll try not to be biased (since I’m a moderator) but this game in genuinely super fun. Theres an entire campaign you can get, and multiplayer! In multiplayer Theres multiple races you can do with your friends or some friendly others! In the campaign you travel through different worlds, jumping from block to block, dodging different enemies (including crocodiles, evil clouds, and angry bois…). I recommend this game to its full extent. Play Sky Climb now!

reviews.review_title: 3d Mario, Pacman, and Fall Guys combined
reviews.review_description: I went into this game just expecting a generic downhill race sorta game. Unfortunately the multiplayer servers were empty most of the time but when they aren't it is like fall guys but more floaty like Mario. The story at first seems mildly fun with great parkour but not many factors but just when you get comfortable it starts to pick up fairly early needing to fight bosses and parkour with a single hand because water pistols to fend them off. Also the tutorial is very helpful and if you can't complete a level it grants you help but doesn't get in the way by interrupting you too early. I think with more recognition and a bigger multiplayer community it could be even better but for the story alone the price point I believe is hard to beat.
I bought the game and the level 1 button didn’t work and I couldn’t play and I paid for it🤬🤬🤬

developer_response.body:
Hello AuriemmaFamily! We deeply apologize for this issue.
We just released a new Update where we fixed this bug. Please let us know if you still have this problem (version 1.0785).

Any help you need, please join our discord to talk directly to us: discord.gg/guqKjs4d34

reviews.review_description:
Aesthetics: The game boasts great aesthetics, immersing players in visually captivating environments.
Gameplay: Prepare for a challenge! The gameplay is demanding, requiring skill and determination.
Movements: Unfortunately, the movements are quite difficult to master. Navigating through the virtual world can be a real test of coordination.
In summary, while I initially expected a carefree experience of leaping through the skies, I found the game’s difficulty level surprising. However, for those who appreciate a blend of Mario and Fall Guy vibes, this game might still offer an enjoyable adventure!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing! Also thanks for the detailed review

We just did an updated including an assist mode for analog stick controls. Should make the game easier, I would love your view on it

If you are looking for players or to know more about the game updates, please join our discord https://discord.gg/SDfM4EHfYN

reviews.review_title: Fly like a bird, sting like a bee!
reviews.review_description: There are maybe many climbing/flying experiences out there but not quite like this! Intuitive controls right from the get go letting you soar through the air flapping your arms and gliding like a bird. The ease of floating between blocks with a sense of weightlessness. But lets not forget the fun challenges presented throughout this game that keep this game replayable: leaderboards on every level providing a new challenge to compete against other players and a thrilling multiplayer mode where you can compete against your friends. The addition of an easy to use "Builder" mode ensures no matter how many times you come back to this game there will always be new fun challenges to take on. This game caters well to all kinds of VR players from the inexperienced to the completionists providing easy control tutorials within its first level as well as coins within each level which give the player to goals to work towards with the included character customisation. The music and cartoon style fit this game well making it easy on the eyes as well easier to distinguish interactable objects from backgrounds.
